name: vlpfc-gate
description: vlPFC interference filter (RESEARCH.md §PFC.vlPFC). When --include-superseded surfaces an out-of-date fact alongside its successor, --filter-conflicts drops the superseded entry from results. Uses recorded supersession only (entry.superseded_by) — never lexical inference.
remembers: Production deployment runs on Heroku Standard-2X dynos in eu-west-1 with Postgres add-on
Team standup is at 10am every Tuesday in the main meeting room
Alice prefers green tea in the morning before the daily sync

actions.new_content: Production deployment now uses AWS Fargate in us-east-1 with an RDS Aurora cluster
